intro: Take Flight in a Beautiful World of Paper
description:
You aren't just piloting a plane, you are the plane. Immerse yourself in a relaxing yet challenging adventure where the world is crafted entirely from paper and physics rule the skies. Forget powerful thrusters; here, gravity is your engine. You must learn to read the wind, diving down to build momentum and pulling up to soar over obstacles in a seamless dance of speed and altitude.

Travel through a variety of atmospheric chapters, ranging from scorching Dry Deserts and lush Tropical Forests to freezing Arctic Ice Caves, each offering new challenges and beautiful vistas. Enjoy a meditative solo journey to collect "Quantum" and unlock 11 distinct paper airplanes.

Key Features:
★ Physics-Based Flight: Master a unique control scheme where diving gains speed and climbing consumes momentum.
★ Stunning Environments: Explore a diverse world with distinct biomes, including deserts, forests, and ice caves.
★ Unlockable Fleet: Collect resources to unlock and pilot 11 different paper airplanes, from simple gliders to complex designs.
★ Atmospheric Audio: Immerse yourself with soothing wind effects and a relaxing soundtrack designed for "flow state" gameplay.
